reason: Replace named lender and market-rate presets with a written-offer comparison engine. Users enter each offer's currency, amount, reducing-balance or flat method, nominal rate, term, cash deduction, upfront, monthly and final costs. Cash received and total borrowing cost remain explicit, fees are not silently capitalised, and the engine suppresses a winner when principal or term differs. It does not calculate or claim a regulated APR, lender quote, approval or recommendation. No protected golden fixture existed, so the new engine registration has no carried result delta.
